parameters.query:
-- Find orgs hitting milestones
SELECT
  o.id AS organization_id,
  o.name,
  o.activated_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - o.activated_at)) / 86400 AS days_active,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM usage_events ue WHERE ue.organization_id = o.id) AS total_events,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(cs.overall), 0) FROM csi_scores cs WHERE cs.organization_id = o.id) AS csi_score
FROM organizations o
WHERE o.subscription_status = 'active'
  AND o.activated_at IS NOT NULL;

-- Issue loyalty credits (idempotent via source_metadata check)
INSERT INTO tenant_credits (organization_id, dimension, credits_purchased, credits_remaining, source, source_metadata, expires_at, status)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.organization_id }}',
  '{{ $json.dimension }}',
  {{ $json.quantity }},
  {{ $json.quantity }},
  'loyalty',
  '{"milestone": "{{ $json.milestone }}", "reason": "{{ $json.reason }}"}',
  (NOW() + INTERVAL '90 days'),
  'active'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM tenant_credits
  WHERE organization_id = '{{ $json.organization_id }}'
    AND source = 'loyalty'
    AND source_metadata->>'milestone' = '{{ $json.milestone }}'
)
RETURNING id;
